title: Gomoku AI Web App
description: Online Gomoku (Five-in-a-Row) game where players can compete against another human locally or challenge an AI opponent. Frontend built with Vite, backend with Python/FastAPI.

title: Chip Settler
description: A mobile‑responsive web app that helps poker players quickly calculate who owes money to whom at the end of a home game, eliminating manual calculation that is prone to mistakes.

title: Shizen Sushi Restaurant Website
description: A responsive production restaurant website for a local sushi restaurant using Next.js and Typescript, based on the business owner's constant weekly feedback, along with CMS driven menu and content system.

title: Workout Tracker App
description: A complete workout tracker built with Android Studio and Java. Features external API integration, local database, and statistics graphs for tracking fitness progress.

title: Nom Nom Express
description: Full-stack restaurant ordering web app for school project built with the LAMP stack among 4 students team, integrating a secure payment gateway for seamless online food ordering.

title: Benkei - Samurai Duel Game
description: A 3D samurai duel game with a minimal combat system for two players, focusing on skill-based interaction. Built with Godot.

title: DVD Corner Bouncer
description: A retro-style Python game that mimics the classic DVD logo bouncing around the screen. The player aims to hit the logo into the corner using a smiley face.
